command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 'sleep 40 && cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import json, datetime
from pathlib import Path

JOB = \"phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2\"
RUN = \"bg-20260623T214813Z-7d3dda75\"
WS = Path(\"memory/execution-pipeline/governed\") / JOB / \"_background\" / RUN

print(\"=STATE=\")
sp = WS / \"run-state.json\"
if sp.is_file():
    d = json.loads(sp.read_text())
    print(\"status:\", d.get(\"status\"))
    print(\"wave11_version:\", d.get(\"wave11_version\"))
    print(\"lease_expires_at:\", d.get(\"lease_expires_at\"))
else:
    print(\"no state file\")

print(\"=HB=\")
hp = WS / \"heartbeat-liveness.json\"
if hp.is_file():
    hb = json.loads(hp.read_text())
    print(\"ts:\", hb.get(\"ts\"))
    print(\"hb_count:\", hb.get(\"hb_count\"))
    print(\"stage:\", hb.get(\"stage\"))
    print(\"wave11_version:\", hb.get(\"wave11_version\"))
    ts_str = hb.get(\"ts\",\"\")
    if ts_str:
        ts_dt = datetime.datetime.fromisoformat(ts_str.replace(\"Z\",\"+00:00\"))
        age = (datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)-ts_dt).total_seconds()
        print(\"hb_age_s:\", round(age,1))
else:
    print(\"no HB file\")

print(\"=PID=\")
import subprocess
r = subprocess.run([\"kill\",\"-0\",\"75400\"], capture_output=True)
print(\"ALIVE\" if r.returncode==0 else \"DEAD\")

print(\"=LEDGER TAIL=\")
lp = WS / \"event-ledger.ndjson\"
if lp.is_file():
    lines = lp.read_text().strip().split(\"\n\")
    for l in lines[-6:]: print(l)

print(\"=WORKER LOG=\")
wlp = WS / \"worker.log\"
if wlp.is_file() and wlp.stat().st_size > 0:
    print(wlp.read_text()[-300:])
else:
    print(\"empty\")
" 2>&1'
